objective: Use perimeter to find an unknown side length of a polygon

learn.title: 미지의 변 — 알려진 변을 빼기
learn.content: If you know the perimeter and some side lengths, you can find the missing side. Subtract the known sides from the perimeter. Example: A triangle has perimeter 24 cm. Two sides are 9 cm and 7 cm. Missing side = 24 − 9 − 7 = 8 cm. 예: A triangle has a perimeter of 30 cm. Two sides are 11 cm and 10 cm. What is the third side? → 9 cm. (30 − 11 − 10 = 9 cm.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.3 'Find Unknown Side Lengths' pp.421-424
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lesson 18 — Unknown Side Lengths
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 직사각형 — 가로 알면 세로 구하기
learn.content: For a rectangle, opposite sides are equal. If perimeter = 22 cm and length = 7 cm, then: 7 + 7 = 14. Remaining = 22 − 14 = 8. Width = 8 ÷ 2 = 4 cm. 예: A rectangle has a perimeter of 28 ft and a length of 9 ft. What is the width? → 5 ft. (9 + 9 = 18. 28 − 18 = 10. Width = 10 ÷ 2 = 5 ft.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.3 'Find Unknown Side Lengths' pp.421-424
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lesson 18 — Unknown Side Lengths
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 정사각형 — 둘레 ÷ 4
learn.content: For a square, all sides are equal. If perimeter = 40 cm, then side = 40 ÷ 4 = 10 cm. You can use algebra: 4 × s = 40, so s = 40 ÷ 4 = 10. 예: A square has a perimeter of 48 inches. What is the side length? → 12 inches. (48 ÷ 4 = 12 inches.)

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.3 'Find Unknown Side Lengths' pp.421-424
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lesson 18 — Unknown Side Lengths
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 2단계 루틴 — 직사각형 미지 변
learn.content: 직사각형 둘레와 가로(또는 세로) 알 때 나머지 구하기:   단계 1) 둘레 − (아는 변 × 2) = 모르는 두 변의 합.   단계 2) 그 합 ÷ 2 = 모르는 변 1개. 예: P=20, l=6 → 20−12=8 → 8÷2=4. w=4. 🔍 핵심: 직사각형은 마주 보는 변이 같으므로 같은 변 2개가 남음.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.3 'Find Unknown Side Lengths' pp.421-424
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lesson 18 — Unknown Side Lengths
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 검산 — 다시 더해서 둘레 확인
learn.content: 미지의 변을 구한 후 모든 변을 다시 더해 둘레와 같은지 확인. 예: P=20, l=6, w=4 (구한 값) → 6+4+6+4 = 20 ✓. 🔍 다르면 어딘가 계산 오류. 검산 습관은 답의 신뢰도를 높임.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.3 'Find Unknown Side Lengths' pp.421-424
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lesson 18 — Unknown Side Lengths
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.3 'Find Unknown Side Lengths' pp.421-424
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lesson 18 — Unknown Side Lengths
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 흔한 함정 — 더하면 안 됨 (M06)
learn.content: ❌ 잘못된 풀이: 둘레 + 아는 변 → 더 커짐. 예: P=20, l=6, w=? → 20+6=26 (잘못!). ✅ 올바름: P − 아는 변 = 모르는 변 합. 🔍 직관: 둘레는 모든 변의 합 → 아는 부분을 빼면 모르는 부분이 남음.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.3 'Find Unknown Side Lengths' pp.421-424
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lesson 18 — Unknown Side Lengths
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 실생활 — 펜스/액자 미지 변
learn.content: 실생활 예: 직사각형 마당, 펜스 36 m. 가로가 12 m라면 세로는?   36 − 24 = 12 → 12÷2 = 6 m 세로. 🔍 검산: 12+6+12+6 = 36 m ✓. 단위 통일 잊지 말기 (M03 방지).

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.3 'Find Unknown Side Lengths' pp.421-424
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lesson 18 — Unknown Side Lengths
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r3.question: A rectangle has a perimeter of 36 cm. The length is twice the width. What are the length and width? Show your work.
practice_r3.answer: Width = 6 cm, Length = 12 cm. Let w = width, l = 2w. P = 2(l + w) = 2(2w + w) = 2(3w) = 6w = 36. So w = 6, l = 12.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.3 'Find Unknown Side Lengths' pp.421-424
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lesson 18 — Unknown Side Lengths
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r3.question: An irregular hexagon has a perimeter of 42 cm. Five sides measure 6, 8, 7, 9, and 5 cm. What is the sixth side? Explain.
practice_r3.answer: Sixth side = 7 cm. Add known sides: 6+8+7+9+5 = 35. Missing = 42 − 35 = 7 cm.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.3 'Find Unknown Side Lengths' pp.421-424
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lesson 18 — Unknown Side Lengths
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r3.question: Can a rectangle and a square have the same perimeter but different side lengths? Give an example.
practice_r3.answer: Yes. Example: Square with side 6 cm → P = 24 cm. Rectangle 8 cm × 4 cm → P = 24 cm. Same perimeter, different side lengths.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.10 Lesson 10.3 'Find Unknown Side Lengths' pp.421-424
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 7 Lesson 18 — Unknown Side Lengths
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r3.question: A rectangular yard has perimeter 50 ft. The length is 15 ft. Lily computes the width as 50 − 15 = 35 ft. What's wrong?
choices: A. 그녀는 P + l 연산을 해야 함
B. 그녀는 길이를 두 번 빼고 ÷2 해야 함 (M06)
